Records.authors: Costas G. Papadopoulos, Damiano Tommasini, Christopher Wever
Records.description: Integrals of this family are defined in Eq. (2.8) and all masters (powers) are listed in Eq. (2.9). Extra files containing results: https://www.dropbox.com/s/90iiqfcazrhwtso/results.tgz?dl=0
